title: 120 Pack Colorful Rainbow Party Tableware Set Paper Cups, Multicolor Dinner Paper Plates, Luncheon Cocktail Napkins, Wooden Forks, Disposable Party Supplies Pack for DIY Holiday Wedding Birthday
features: 🎈【Colorful Tableware Set】You will get 120Pcs party tableware, including 30 7-inch rainbow birthday plates, 30 paper cups, 30 cocktail napkins in 6 different colors (5 per color), and an additional 30 wooden knives and forks. The quantity is sufficient and the set is complete. You can use these to fully enjoy your party.

🎈【Safety Materials】The colored plates, cups, and napkins are all made of high-quality paper, while the spoons are made of high-quality wood. All are food grade safe materials, environmentally friendly and biodegradable, with a smooth surface, no burrs, and no odor.

🎈【Size】party plates diameter: 7 inches, paper cup capacity: 250ml, napkin size: 25 * 25cm, spoon size: 13cm, 30 pieces per utensil, a total of 120 pieces. These tableware are sturdy and durable, and will not be damaged or deformed even when filled with a full load of food.

🎈【Atmosphere Creation】：This rainbow tableware set is designed in 6 colors, namely red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple. The bright colors make the party more lively and suitable for parties with different themes, serving as a helper to create an atmosphere.

🎈【Widely Used】：These colored paper trays can be used at various parties and gatherings, such as weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, engagements, baby showers, graduation ceremonies, picnics, barbecues, children's parties, bachelor parties, Thanksgiving parties, cocktail parties, Halloween parties, Christmas parties, and more.
description: Package includes: 30 x 7 inch Rainbow Plates ( red, orange,yellow, green, blue, purple ) 30 x Napkins ( red, orange,yellow, green, blue, purple) 30 x Rainbow Cups ( red, orange,yellow, green, blue, purple) 30 x Spork Material: Paper，Natural Wood Cup's Size: 250ml Plate's Size: 18cm/7inch Napkin's Size: 25cm*25cm/ 9.84in*9.84in
